LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS BLADE RUNNER TOOLS, INC. AND SHADY ALZAYAT'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION. A PLAINTIFF NEED NOT ELECT, AND CANNOT BE COMPELLED TO ELECT, BETWEEN INCONSISTENT REMEDIES DURING THE COURSE OF TRIAL PRIOR TO JUDGMENT. (SEE BAKER V. SUPERIOR COURT (1983) 150 CAL.APP.3D 140, 145.) SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD WHETHER THE AGREEMENT BREACHED IS ORAL OR WRITTEN. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: DIANA CHEN, CSR # 11312

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-04-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2012 Continued To Mar-06-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTS BLADE RUNNER TOOLS, INC. AND SHADY ALZAYAT'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled as to the first cause of action. A plaintiff need not elect, and cannot be compelled to elect, between inconsistent remedies during the course of trial prior to judgment. (See Baker v. Superior Court (1983) 150 Cal.App.3d 140, 145.) Sustained with leave to amend as to the second cause of action. Plaintiff is given leave to amend to plead whether the agreement breached is oral or written. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR # 11312 =(302/MJM)INT

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
